use_cases: Standalone call-to-action buttons that need to grab user attention
Interactive buttons for creative apps or games with satisfying click feedback
Landing page CTA buttons with premium animated effects
E-commerce product page buttons with memorable interactions
ai_summary: An interactive button component featuring a visually striking shatter/particle explosion animation triggered on click. Uses Framer Motion for smooth fragment dispersal effects with customizable colors and shard counts. Includes hover scaling and tap feedback for a polished user experience. Ideal for creating memorable, high-engagement call-to-action buttons in modern web applications.
